message:
✨ Fix search, view mode, cache persistence, and add refresh button (#1543)

Search:
- Global search bar now filters all tabs (installers/solutions/recommended)
- AND logic: 'argo events' matches items containing both 'argo' AND 'events'
- Local tab search overrides global search when populated
- Dynamic placeholder text per active tab

View mode:
- Card/list toggle now works for installer and solution grids
- List view shows compact single-row layout with coverage icons
- Added compact prop to InstallerCard and SolutionCard

Cache:
- Preserve activeTab, searchQuery, and filter state across dialog re-opens
- Removed init effect resets of activeTab/searchQuery/filters
- Module-level cache persists across sidebar close/open

Refresh:
- Added refresh button (↻) in tab bar to re-fetch all mission data
- Spins while data is loading

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
